scripts.bundle:mac:debug: MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=13.0 pnpm tauri build --debug --bundles app && MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=13.0 ./scripts/bundle_runtime_libs_macos.sh ./src-tauri/target/debug/bundle/macos/Soia.app
scripts.bundle:mac:release: MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=13.0 pnpm tauri build --bundles app && MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=13.0 ./scripts/bundle_runtime_libs_macos.sh ./src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Soia.app && ./scripts/bundle_dmg_macos.sh ./src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Soia.app
scripts.bundle:mac:intel: MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=13.0 MPV_TARGET_ARCH=x86_64 pnpm tauri build --target x86_64-apple-darwin --bundles app && MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=13.0 ./scripts/bundle_runtime_libs_macos.sh ./src-tauri/target/x86_64-apple-darwin/release/bundle/macos/Soia.app && ./scripts/bundle_dmg_macos.sh ./src-tauri/target/x86_64-apple-darwin/release/bundle/macos/Soia.app
scripts.bundle:linux:debug: pnpm tauri build --debug --bundles deb && node ./scripts/bundle_runtime_libs_linux.mjs --profile debug
scripts.bundle:linux:release: pnpm tauri build --bundles deb && node ./scripts/bundle_runtime_libs_linux.mjs --profile release && node ./scripts/prepare_tauri_linuxdeploy_plugin_gtk.mjs && pnpm tauri build --bundles appimage
